narrative:
Gibson Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 711 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 2.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 50.8 percentage points.
